Appearances:
Plaintiff Patricia Zarur is NOT present. Sarah E Cooners, Attorney in fact is present.
Attorney Jerod Hendrickson for the plaintiff.
Defendants Taffi Vasquez and Jimmy Zarur are present.
Attorney Salvatore Timpano appearing for the defendants in full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of July 20, 2015 remains on calendar. (501/jpt)
